name: Sheresh Containment Research Concord
summary: Institution coordinating contamination measurement, shield testing, and controlled dangerous study across the domes.
day_to_day: Runs experiments, calibrates shields, logs residue patterns, and issues containment advisories.
who_works_there: Researchers, ward technicians, archive keepers, expedition leads, maintenance partners.
who_uses_it: Commune leadership, route wardens, repair crews, families depending on dome safety.
authority: Can advise or trigger containment restrictions and shape research priorities.
public_manifestation: Testing wards, sealed chambers, expedition briefings, public notices after anomalies.
conflict_or_bottleneck: Scientific necessity and public fear are in constant friction.
